Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used when calculating the ID for attack parameters. It is not used directly on the actual machine.

Fields.Name: Behavior Judge ID
Fields.Description: Used when calculating the ID for attack parameters. This ID matches the action judgment ID entered in TimeActEditor. It is not used directly on the actual machine.

Fields.Name: Reference Type
Fields.Description: Specify the reference ID so that it is correct.

Fields.Name: Reference ID
Fields.Description: It can be used properly according to the attack power, missile, ID of special effect parameter, and refType.

Fields.Name: SFX Variation ID
Fields.Description: SFX used for multiplayer session actions

Fields.Name: Stamina Cost
Fields.Description: Set the amount of stamina consumed during action.

Fields.Name: Durability Cost
Fields.Description: Set the durability of weapons consumed during action.

Fields.Name: Category
Fields.Description: Since there are effects (enchantment weapons, etc.) whose parameters fluctuate depending on skills, magic, items, etc., set each action so that the determined effect can correspond to the effect such as power up only weapon attack. Set None for items that do not need to be set, such as varistor.

Fields.Name: Humanity Cost
Fields.Description: Set the amount of humanity consumed during action
